This 43-inch flat panel display delivers 3840x2160 resolution with a 60Hz refresh rate and 178-degree wide viewing angle, offering crisp, vibrant visuals from every angle. Equipped with multiple connectivity options including 3 HDMI ports, DP, DVI-D, USB, audio, RS232C, and RJ45 LAN, it ensures seamless integration with various devices. The monitor features a sleek black bezel, built-in 10W speakers, and supports 24/7 operation with IPS technology and smart energy-saving functions. Perfect for business, home office, or digital signage, this new monitor combines performance, reliability, and versatility in one sleek package.

Key Features

  • Ultra-Large 98-Inch Screen: Deliver impactful presentations and immersive signage experiences with a massive 98-inch display that commands attention in any professional space.
  • Stunning 4K UHD Resolution: Enjoy exceptional clarity with 3840 x 2160 resolution, producing sharp images and lifelike detail ideal for digital signage and professional use.
  • High Brightness & Wide Viewing Angle: With 500 nits brightness and a 178° viewing angle, content remains clear and visible even in brightly lit environments.
  • Versatile Connectivity Options: Multiple input options including HDMI, USB, DVI, Serial, Wireless LAN, and Ethernet ensure seamless integration with modern systems
  • Reliable & Professional Design: Built for continuous operation with a durable glossy finish and high contrast ratio of 2000:1, ensuring consistent performance and style.
  • Smart webOS 6.0 Platform: Integrated webOS 6.0 provides advanced content management, intuitive navigation, and support for various apps to enhance productivity.

Reviews.comment: Fantastic clarity and easy to integrate into our signage system. HDMI, DP and LAN control work flawlessly.
Excellent 4K picture and solid build. Would like slightly better color calibration out of the box.
Great value for a commercial 43" 4K screen. RS232 and LAN management are a big plus.
Good image quality but the brightness could be higher for very bright retail environments.
Setup was straightforward and the multiple HDMI inputs let us run several sources without swapping cables.
Decent monitor overall. Had some trouble with DVI scaling initially, but support helped resolve it.
Build quality is okay but received a unit with a dead pixel. Replacement process took extra time.
Reliable 4K performance for our lobby display. Lightweight for wall mounting and stable on a desk mount.
Sharp picture, very responsive 60Hz and 5ms response time works well for all content types.
Received a unit with backlight bleeding. Customer service was slow to respond.
USB playback and network features are handy for independent signage setups. Good purchase.
Solid commercial display. Color accuracy is decent after a quick calibration pass.

seo.metaTitle: Pair Car Rear Seat TV Player 4K Video Touch Screen Music Headrest Mon…
seo.metaDescription: 4K crystal clear pictures and smooth videos. Use headrest to install hardware, which is easy to install. Support for phone mirroring and screen synchronization…

Reviews.comment: Picture quality is fantastic — true 4K clarity on long drives. Easy to install and the touch controls are responsive.
Great screen and Android 11 feels snappy for media apps. Phone mirroring worked seamlessly with my iPhone.
Solid headrest monitor. RAM is limited at 2GB but still handles video playback well. Would buy again.
Good display and mounting is easy, but occasional app crashes when switching sources. Support was helpful.
Decent value for money. Installation took longer than expected because of wiring, and sound needed tweaking.
Phone mirroring works but lags sometimes with Android phones. Build quality feels average.
Very bright IPS panel and viewing angles are great for rear passengers. Remote control is handy.
Received one unit with a dead pixel and slow performance. Had to return — customer service was okay about the refund.
Excellent for kids on long trips. Battery of car powers smoothly, and storage is enough for several movies (32GB).
Universal fit worked well with my SUV headrests. Display sharpness and colors are impressive for the price.
Average audio output; needed external speakers for better sound. Mirror connection dropped a few times.
Good features: Android 11, apps install easily. Would like a bit more RAM for smoother multitasking.
